heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 5106 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out this chapter $7,500,000 for each of the fiscal years 1988 through 2023.
notes: Amendments2018— substituted “2023” for “2018”.Pub. L. 115–3342014— substituted “2018” for “2015”.Pub. L. 113–792010— substituted “2015” for “2010”.Pub. L. 111–2332005— substituted “2010” for “2005”.Pub. L. 109–172000— substituted “2005” for “2000”.Pub. L. 106–4721994— substituted “2000” for “1995”.Pub. L. 103–3541990— substituted “1995” for “1991”.Pub. L. 101–624
